title: Personalised Pink Garland Baby Keepsake Box | Pine Rustic Decorative Keepsake Box | Extra Large Size | W36cm x D26.9cm x H20cm
features: Personalised Just for You: Add your own custom text for a truly unique touch.
Precious Memories, Beautifully Kept: A heartwarming gift to welcome a new baby, this keepsake box is the perfect way to store those tiny treasures that mark the beginning of a lifetime of memories.
Handcrafted from Natural Pine: Each box is carefully made from solid pine wood, boasting its own rustic charm and character.

Thoughtful Gift for New Parents: Whether it's for a baby shower, christening, or just to celebrate the arrival of a new little one, this personalised keepsake box is a gift that will be treasured for years to come.

Versatile Size: With external dimensions of W36cm x D26.9cm x H20cm and internal dimensions of W34.4cm x D25.3cm x H16.2cm, the box is large enough to hold cherished mementos while remaining compact and easy to display.
description: Celebrate new life with our Personalised Pink Garland Baby Keepsake Box. This beautiful gorgeous garland box is the perfect place to store your baby's most treasured keepsakes – from hospital bands to tiny handprints. Personalise it with your little one's name and birthdate, creating a unique and sentimental gift that will be cherished for many years to come. Choose from five sizes (16cm, 20cm, 26cm, 30cm, and 36cm) to find the perfect fit for your growing collection of memories. Crafted from natural pine wood, each box showcases a unique wood grain pattern and features a secure clasp and metal hinges, ensuring your precious mementos are kept safe. Whether you're welcoming your baby or searching for a thoughtful gift for new parents, this keepsake box is a beautiful way to capture the magic of those early years and create a lasting legacy of love.
